description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet with a dark, wood-textured exterior and three horizontally aligned drawers on the front. The drawers are accented with a contrasting yellowish-brown face and bordered by a reddish trim, each featuring a prominent black bar handle for easy gripping. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top, sides, and back are uniformly dark, with a subtle wood grain pattern visible on the surface. The overall construction suggests a robust, functional design suitable for storing documents or office supplies. The absence of visible locks or label holders gives it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance.
description: A dark wood-textured filing cabinet with three yellow-brown drawers, each featuring a black bar handle and reddish trim. The cabinet stands on four short legs and has a sturdy, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three yellow-brown drawers with black bar handles and reddish trim, set in a dark cabinet frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark wood-textured panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, dark wood-textured back panel with no features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid, featureless dark panel.
